data.title: GSK Seeks FDA Approval For Oral Antibiotic For Urinary Tract Infections, Probably First In New Class In Over 20 Years
data.description: GSK's gepotidacin, an oral antibiotic for uUTIs, could be the first in over 20 years. The FDA granted Priority Review with a March 2025 decision expected. Trials showed better efficacy than nitrofurantoin.

data.title: Crypto Trader Turns $727 Into $2.44M In 5 Days With Viral AI-Conceived Meme Coin
data.description:
A trader has turned $727 into $2.44 million in five days for a 3,176x return with GOAT, a meme coin independently conceived by an AI bot.



What Happened: Lookonchain on Wednesday reported on the trader’s fortune:
